title: Grand Mornight
description: A savory and sweet Argentine dish combining Grand Marnier with a crunchy layer of bhuna spices for a unique date-night treat.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the bhuna spice blend and cook for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Gradually whisk in flour and water/milk mixture to create a smooth sauce.
In another bowl, mix together date purée and Grand Marnier. Adjust seasoning as needed.
Pour the sauce over the prepared spices and stir gently to combine.
Let it simmer for 2-3 minutes until thickened slightly.
Serve warm with crusty bread or on top of a low-calorie-friendly dessert.
